description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark gray gable roof and a mix of white and brown exterior walls. The structure features large windows, especially on the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light. A covered porch with supporting columns extends along the front, leading to a prominent main entryway. The property includes a detached garage or outbuilding set back from the main house, connected by a driveway and walkway. The house sits on a neatly landscaped lot with green lawns and paved paths, bordered by a low wall on one side. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a detached garage on a landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, large windows, and driveway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the house, the detached garage, and the driveway connecting both structures.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back porch, rear windows, and the boundary wall enclosing part of the yard.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear facade, multiple windows, and the enclosed backyard with the detached garage visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, supporting columns, and a prominent front door
